translated: [CORNER: Card Illustrations] All right, then, let's talk about the event while looking at the card illustrations.
I'm appearing on the monitor right now, right? On everyone's screens?
Yes, I'll believe that I am.
First, let's look at Mizuki's pre-training card.
Here it is.
I absolutely love this illustration.
First of all, seeing Ena looking at Mizuki with such a happy smile reminds me of the New Year's event,
where Yuuki-san gave a ribbon to a young Mizuki. It really overlaps with that scene.
And Mizuki's expression here, showing it off and asking "How is it?", is just incredible.
I can't believe this is just the pre-training art.
Seriously.
I love the atmosphere of this space.
Apparently, that's a torii gate in the background.
All right, let's take a look at the post-training version too.
Here it is.
So good.
Butterflies and ribbons have always felt very symbolic for Mizuki,
but in my mind, when those motifs appear in illustrations,
I usually have a strong image of Mizuki holding scissors.
But this time, there are no scissors. It's such a bright space, and even though their mouth is covered, you just know they're smiling. It's so precious.
Really.
My kid is such a good kid, honestly.
Next up is Ena-chan.
I'm so happy Yuuki-san is here too.
Meeting the older sister for the first time and being overwhelmed by how pushy she is...
That "Whoa!" reaction from Ena is just great.
Ena is just so good here.
Isn't she?
If you haven't read the event story yet, please check it out in-game.
Seeing the sister interact with all the siblings is definitely a must-see.
Next... isn't this Ena amazing?
I've always thought girls with flowers in their hair look great,
so this illustration is incredibly good.
I almost thought she was a florist.
Wonderful.
Ena-chan.
So cute.
The way she's looking down slightly is also very nice.
Ena is just so cute.
Next is Len-kun.
How cute! Seeing him eating the souvenirs from his sister is just adorable.
Really cute.
What is this level of cuteness?
Even if that were a protein bar, he'd still be cute.
I just want him to be eating something forever.
Thank you.
Next is the post-training version.
Isn't this insane?
I thought it was insane.
Only you could pull this off.
I thought, "Wow, he really suits short pants."
Truly beautiful.
Thank you.
I just felt so thankful.
The overall taste is quite rare for Niigo, which is nice.
Is he holding a book about daisies?
Probably.
My knowledge of daisies is a bit shallow, but I'm pretty sure that's what it is.
Yeah, it's great.
The idea of "sharing delicious things" is so lovely.
Everything tastes better when you share it.
And then, there's this.
Kanade-chan.
Way too cute.
These clothes look exactly like something Mizuki or Yuuki-san would pick out.
Especially around here.
She looks a little troubled too.
Of course it suits her!
Setting aside where she'd actually wear this...
I mean, it's Kanade.
I'm not sure if she'd actually wear that headpiece when she occasionally goes out.
But it suits her.
If it looks good, I think she should wear it.
Wow, she's really cute.
Thanks for always being so cute, everyone.
And here's the post-training version.
She looks like a proper young lady from a good family.
Are these daisies too?
The ones on her chest and head probably are.
In the side story, Kanade-chan is so cute being made to try on all these different clothes, so please check that out too.
